First event · October 2026 · Riga

Indian Night × Afro Night

One dance floor, two continents. 360 Nights opens with a fusion club night built for Riga's Indian and Latvian crowds alike — live sets, a headline artist flying in from Kerala, and a night built to be talked about after.

Who we are

360 Nights — where Europe meets the subcontinent.

360 Nights is our live events arm: club nights, concerts and culture, opening with a fusion Indian × Afro night built for Riga's Indian and Latvian crowds.

Every 360 Nights event is built the same way as our films — booked for a local audience first, with an eye on bringing the same night to more cities across Europe.
